response.global_analysis: Strict Verification: 1. The audio phonetically matches the 'G-A-M-E-R-S' spelling chant found at the beginning of the 'We are GAMERS !!!!' song in the Reference JSON. 2. The Reference JSON is correct for the song but contains the full track lyrics. 3. All leftover lyrics from the JSON (the rest of the song) have been discarded as the video ends. 4. Subtitles are precisely aligned with the rhythmic 8-bit vocal bursts at the end of the clip; the prominent on-screen text ('Free part has ended') is not subtitled because it lacks driving vocal audio, strictly adhering to the Golden Rule and the requirement to remain silent during purely instrumental segments.
